## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### RTK Read Guardrails
*~9,951 tokens/session saved*
- Avoid repeated partial reads of `src/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py`; after the first truncation or third slice, fetch the full file once with a raised output limit or use `rg -n '^(class|    def|def) '` plus exact line ranges.
- For MCP `read_file` on `.forge/swe-bench/pytest-dev__pytest-5103`, use the canonical repo root and one larger requested range instead of adjacent re-reads.

### Pytest 5103 Paths
*~2,500 tokens/session saved*
- In pytest-dev__pytest-5103, assertion rewriting lives at `src/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py`; do not probe `_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py` without the `src/` prefix.
- Assertion rewrite tests live at `testing/test_assertrewrite.py`, not `src/testing/test_assertrewrite.py`; use this path directly for all/any test searches.

### Shell Verification
*~1,149 tokens/session saved*
- Do not keep retrying `cd .../.forge/swe-bench/pytest-dev__pytest-5103 && python3 ...` import probes after `ModuleNotFoundError`; this old pytest checkout lacks deps such as `atomicwrites`, so prefer AST/compile probes or targeted tests only after deps are confirmed.
- Consolidate exploratory Python checks into one heredoc from the repo root rather than many near-identical `mcp__forge__shell` snippets.

### Search Scope
*~837 tokens/session saved*
- Replace repeated `grep -n "all\|any"` passes with one scoped search such as `rg -n 'all|any|GeneratorExp|comprehension|assert all|assert any' src/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py testing/test_assertrewrite.py`.
- Run `find` once to establish the pytest checkout layout, then cache the results; repeated `find ...pytest-dev__pytest-5103...` calls should be avoided.

### Regex Commands
*~600 tokens/session saved*
- Escape literal parentheses in ripgrep/grep patterns (`visit\(`, `def visit\(`) or use `rg -F` for fixed strings; unescaped `visit(` caused regex parse retries.

### Forge Harness
*~500 tokens/session saved*
- In Forge harness sessions, any web access must use `mcp__forge__web_search` and `mcp__forge__web_fetch`; do not use native/provider browsing tools.

### Task Tracking
*~34 tokens/session saved*
- Skip repeated `mcp__forge__update_tasks` calls for this narrow one-file pytest fix; update tasks only at a real phase boundary or final status.
